scripts.bundle: npm run prep && npx esbuild packages/cli/build.js --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=packages/cli/bundle.js && node --experimental-sea-config sea-config.json && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync(process.execPath, 'build.exe')" && npx postject build.exe NODE_SEA_BLOB sea-prep.blob --sentinel-fuse NODE_SEA_FUSE_fce680ab2cc467b6e072b8b5df1996b2
